1. To start the server use command:
Set-Location "C:\Users\prashanth.nataraj\Desktop\LINKFMS Telemetry analysis project"; Start-Process "http://localhost:8501"; C:/Users/prashanth.nataraj/AppData/Local/Programs/Python/Python313/python.exe -m streamlit run "telemetry-app/agents/linkfms_fetch_app.py" --server.address 0.0.0.0 --server.port 8501

2. to check which ports are running currently:
netstat -ano | findstr LISTENING  (Displays all ports which are running)

3.to check for specific port:
netstat -ano | findstr :8501


4. To kill specific port:
netstat -ano | findstr :8501
